identifying_variation: union vote share barely crosses the recognition threshold
diagnostic_caution: Identifies marginal recognition among close campaigns, not all latent demand for unions.

identifying_variation: linked workers and establishments around new unionization
diagnostic_caution: Separate worker career effects from establishment payroll and composition effects.

identifying_variation: wage distribution under observed and counterfactual coverage
observed_margin: covered wages, uncovered wages, wage compression
diagnostic_caution: Counterfactual wage structures require explicit assumptions about uncovered workers.

identifying_variation: representation rights change at a legal or firm-size threshold
diagnostic_caution: Do not reduce representation institutions to wage premia only.

identifying_variation: labor-market tightness changes worker outside options and organizing activity
unit: worker, campaign, or local labor market
observed_margin: organizing demand, activity, fear, willingness to support representation
diagnostic_caution: Observed activity reflects demand filtered through costs, opposition, law, and tightness.

identifying_variation: state right-to-work law changes union security and resources
observed_margin: union strength, wages, turnout, political participation
diagnostic_caution: Separate labor-market margins from downstream turnout and participation margins.

identifying_variation: countries differ in membership, coverage, bargaining level, and extension rules
diagnostic_caution: Membership, coverage, bargaining level, and extension rules are distinct objects.
